meaning: n.(英国制造的,类似吉普的)多用途越野车,其商标名
examples: It sold its Jaguar, Mazda, Volvo, LandRover, and Aston Martin brands, and is thriving again.
According to his family this happened in full view of a police Landrover whose occupants did nothing.
Bob Dover, the head of Landrover, which is now owned by Ford, entered the fray this week, saying Britain needed to join the single currency.
